summary: Iteration 92 - Bulk Actions for Operations Queue feature testing completed. Backend: 22/22 tests passed for POST /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue/bulk-action endpoint with all 5 actions (assign_owner, update_assignment_status, set_due_date, set_escalation_status, request_approval), validation (entity_type, action, payload), structured results, partial success handling, and activity generation. Frontend: All UI elements verified - checkbox per row, select all checkbox, bulk action toolbar with 5 buttons, action-specific dialogs (owner input, status dropdown, date input, escalation dropdown, approval type dropdown), result summary panel, queue refresh, and selection clear on success. All regression tests passed (iterations 88-91: escalation, assignment, activity, saved views).

seed_data_used.bulk_assignments_created: Multiple UI-Test-Owner and BULK-TEST-* assignments during testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 - Bulk Actions for Operations Queue fully tested. Backend endpoint: POST /api/inventory-ledger/operations-queue/bulk-action with body {entity_type, entity_ids, action, payload}. Valid entity_types: sales_order, po_draft. Valid actions: assign_owner, update_assignment_status, set_due_date, set_escalation_status, request_approval. Response: {action, entity_type, processed_count, succeeded_count, failed_count, results[{entity_id, status, message}]}. Each action generates activity entry. Frontend: OperationsQueuePage.js has full selection (checkbox per row, select all), bulk toolbar (5 buttons + clear), per-action dialogs, result summary. Frontend handles mixed entity types by sending separate requests per entity_type. data-testid attributes: bulk-action-toolbar, bulk-selected-count, bulk-assign-btn, bulk-status-btn, bulk-duedate-btn, bulk-escalation-btn, bulk-approval-btn, bulk-clear-btn, bulk-action-dialog, bulk-owner-input, bulk-asgn-status-select, bulk-duedate-input, bulk-esc-status-select, bulk-approval-type-select, bulk-notes-input, bulk-confirm-btn, bulk-result-summary, bulk-result-success, bulk-result-failed.

validation.422_invalid_entity_type: entity_type must be sales_order or po_draft
validation.422_invalid_action: action must be one of VALID_BULK_ACTIONS
validation.per_entity_validation: Each action validates its required payload fields

bulk_action.activity_generation: Each successful action creates activity entry via _create_activity

bulk_result.failed_details: Shows entity_id: message for each failed item

OperationsQueuePage.mixed_entity_handling: Frontend sends separate requests per entity_type (sales_order, po_draft)
OperationsQueuePage.success_behavior: Selection cleared on full success, preserved on partial failure
OperationsQueuePage.queue_refresh: Queue data reloads after bulk action completes

mocked_apis_note: Email service is mocked. BC API uses demo mode.
